summary: Iteration 8 — Verification of tiny diff: TEST_USER_PASSWORD hoisted from hardcoded literal to os.environ.get('TEST_USER_PASSWORD', 'Test@12345') in test_cardost_api.py (line 20) and test_cardost_iteration5_regression.py (new const at line 22, used in signup at line 113). (1) Full backend pytest sweep against live preview backend (REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://stereo-connect-2.preview.emergentagent.com): 107 passed + 2 skipped + 0 failed in 48.54s across 7 test files (test_cardost_api, test_cardost_bugfixes, test_cardost_iteration5_regression, test_cardost_iteration7_seo, test_cardost_smtp_migration, test_cardost_universal, test_cardost_vehicles). Totals match iteration_7 baseline EXACTLY. The 2 skips are the same Razorpay LIVE-mode checkout skips as before (TestGuestCheckout::test_guest_create_and_verify_order and TestUserCheckout::test_logged_in_order_linked_to_user — both skip when checkout response.mock is False; not related to this diff). (2) Both touched files independently re-run and all relevant tests pass — test_cardost_api.py 22 passed + 2 skipped, and test_cardost_iteration5_regression.py::TestAdminEndpointsReachable::test_non_admin_user_gets_403_on_admin_stats PASSED. (3) Env-var override smoke test confirmed: with TEST_USER_PASSWORD=CustomPass123 exported, test_cardost_api.py and the targeted regression test BOTH pass — proving signup/login both consume the env value (not the literal). (4) No new warnings beyond the pre-existing PytestRemovedIn10Warning class-scoped-fixture deprecation in test_cardost_bugfixes.py (carried from iteration_7, unrelated). No code quality regressions introduced by this diff. Acceptance criteria met: same totals as iteration_7 (107 passed + 2 skipped + 0 failed) and env-var override works as expected.
critical_code_review_comments: Carry-over (unchanged from iter_7, NOT introduced by this diff): /app/frontend/public/index.html still has duplicate static og:* / twitter:card tags causing duplicates with React-injected dynamic SEO tags — most scrapers pick the stale first occurrence. Already documented in iteration_7.json design_issues; remains the only outstanding SEO defect.
Carry-over: test_cardost_bugfixes.py uses an instance-method class-scoped fixture — pytest 10 will drop support. Convert to @classmethod or session-scope. Not introduced by this diff.
test_credentials: admin@cardost.com / Admin@123 (env-overridable TEST_ADMIN_EMAIL/TEST_ADMIN_PASSWORD). Throwaway test user uses TEST_USER_PASSWORD env (default Test@12345). All confirmed working.
seed_data_creation: None — tests use dynamic per-run unique emails (TEST_user_{run_id}@cardost-test.com) and the existing seeded admin/products. Tests self-clean test-created products.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression baseline holds at 107 passed + 2 skipped. Razorpay checkout tests skip on LIVE mode (toggle Admin → Integrations → Razorpay → MOCK_MODE to exercise them). Frontend SEO duplicate-og:* defect from iter_7 still open in /app/frontend/public/index.html — not retested this round per task scope (backend-only). TEST_USER_PASSWORD now env-overridable; default 'Test@12345' preserved for backward compat.
rca of the issue: N/A — no failures. The diff is a non-behavioral refactor: literal → os.environ.get(...) with the same default. Verified by (a) full sweep matching iter_7 totals, (b) re-running the two touched files isolated, and (c) confirming env-var override path is actually wired by exporting TEST_USER_PASSWORD=CustomPass123 and re-running — still passes, proving signup body reads the env value end-to-end.
